parameters.content:
## WORKFLOW 4: exprs-smartlead-push

**TRIGGER:** Schedule (hourly)
**COST:** Free (Smartlead API, already on Pro plan)

### FLOW
Schedule → Supabase: Get Ready →
  Check Empty → Build Payload →
  Route by Score (switch) →
    ├─ 🥇 Golden → Campaign: Full 3-bullet ideas (Format A)
    │   Sequence: p1 (ideas) → p2 (Pillar A) → p3 (Pillar B) → p4 (CIPD) → e1
    ├─ 💪 Strong → Campaign: One-liner ideas (Format B)
    │   Sequence: p1 (one-liner) → p2 (pillar) → e1
    └─ ✅ Must-Have → Campaign: Standard PP-Email
        Sequence: p1 → p4 → e1
  → Merge → Parse Response → Mark Sent in Supabase

### QUERY FILTER
`qualified = true AND creative_ideas IS NOT NULL AND sent_at IS NULL`

### CUSTOM VARIABLES (in Smartlead templates)
`{{creative_idea_1}}`, `{{creative_idea_2}}`, `{{creative_idea_3}}`
`{{one_liner}}`, `{{lead_pillar}}`, `{{score}}`, `{{signal_summary}}`

### ENV VARS
`SMARTLEAD_API_KEY`
`SMARTLEAD_CAMPAIGN_GOLDEN`
`SMARTLEAD_CAMPAIGN_STRONG`
`SMARTLEAD_CAMPAIGN_MUSTHAVE`

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs hourly to check for prospects ready to push. Can also be triggered manually.

nodes.name: Supabase: Get Ready Prospects
nodes.notes: Fetches prospects that are qualified, have creative ideas generated, and haven't been sent yet.

nodes.name: Route by Score
nodes.notes: Routes prospects to the correct Smartlead campaign based on their score tier. Uses Code node instead of Switch for import compatibility.

nodes.name: Smartlead: Golden Campaign
nodes.notes:
Campaign: 'Exprs Golden - Full Ideas'
Template: 3-bullet creative ideas email (Format A)
Sequence: p1 (ideas) → p2 (Pillar A) → p3 (Pillar B) → p4 (CIPD data) → e1 (exit)

nodes.name: Smartlead: Strong Campaign
nodes.notes:
Campaign: 'Exprs Strong - One-Liner Ideas'
Template: One-liner creative ideas email (Format B)
Sequence: p1 (one-liner) → p2 (relevant pillar) → e1 (exit)

nodes.name: Smartlead: Must-Have Campaign
nodes.notes:
Campaign: 'Exprs Must-Have - Standard'
Template: Standard PP-Email sequence
Sequence: p1 → p4 → e1
